name: precedent-brief
description: AI-powered legal research triage app - combined startup orchestration

scripts.setup:python: python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\pip.exe install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('venv')){console.log('Installing Python dependencies...'); process.exit(1);} if(!fs.existsSync('FrontEnd/node_modules')){console.log('Installing Frontend dependencies...'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.predev: npm run setup:env && (npm run setup:check || (npm run setup:python && npm run setup:frontend))
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "MCP,Backend,Frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "npm run dev:mcp" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
